MARCFieldLabel: DATE/TIME AND PLACE OF AN EVENT NOTE (R)
Transformation Notes:
Prepend a, d, o, p, 1 with subfield label:  
If $0, prepend with "Authority record control number or standard number for controlled place of event term:"
If $2, prepend with "Source of term for controlled place of event term:"
If $3, append (Applies to: [$3 value]) to note.

MARCFieldLabel: DATE/TIME AND PLACE OF AN EVENT NOTE (R)
